front: Artist: signed works with a winged snake/serpent carrying a ruby ring
Artist: after son Hans's death, changed signature emblem to a single crow's wing
Artist: court painter to Electors of Saxony; attached to Frederick the Wise's court from 1504
Artist: close friend who painted many portraits of Martin Luther in a floppy black hat
Artist: shared printing presses with Martin Luther; made 22 woodcuts for Luther's German Bible

front: Artist: Law and Gospel woodcut made in consultation with Philip Melanchthon
